final:
module siso_shift_reg (
    input rst_clk,
    input reset,
    input serial_in,
    output reg [3:0] serial_out
);
    
    always @(posedge rst_clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            serial_out <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            serial_out <= {serial_out[2:0], serial_in};
        end
    end
endmodule
